primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for the Care of Kidney Transplant Recipients
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive guidelines covering immunosuppression, monitoring, and complication management

primary_sources.name: AST/ASTS Guidelines for Kidney Transplantation
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based recommendations for transplant evaluation, surgery, and post-transplant care

primary_sources.name: OPTN/UNOS Policies for Kidney Allocation and Transplantation
primary_sources.relevance: Federal regulations governing transplant candidate evaluation, listing, and allocation

primary_sources.name: CMS Conditions for Coverage for Transplant Centers
primary_sources.relevance: Medicare requirements for transplant center operations and patient care standards

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases - Transplant Reviews
secondary_sources.relevance: Peer-reviewed research on transplant outcomes and clinical practices

gaps: Updated KDIGO transplant guidelines (current version from 2009 with limited updates)
Standardized protocols for living donor evaluation across centers
